message: My costs are high. I expect bids above 70 for profitable trades.
I'm a budget buyer with very low valuation. Bids above 70 are impossible for me. I can only consider prices well below 30. If your costs are truly that high, we may not find a deal.
My previous ask was 25, your bid 20. I can lower my ask if you raise your bid. Let's find a deal.
My cost is still high, but I can adjust. If you raise your bid slightly, we can trade again at a good price for both.
I'm eager to trade. My budget limits me to bid 22 maximum. If you ask 21-22, we trade at a nice midpoint. Let's do this.
